name: Achievement Badges
description: Unlockable viewing achievement badges for Jellyfin users.
overview: Unlockable viewing achievement badges for Jellyfin users.

versions.changelog: Initial plugin release
Added API test endpoint for plugin verification
Improved API structure and plugin stability
Added playback simulation endpoint and improved badge logic
Added badge reset endpoint, summary endpoint and improved persistence
Added embedded achievements page with badge viewer
Backend improvements and badge persistence fixes
Major UI stability update. Added embedded dashboard, progress cards, playback simulation, badge reset tools and improved error handling.
Major achievement system expansion. Added large badge catalogue, improved rarity tiers, summary statistics, expanded achievement tracking and improved backend logic.
Personalisation and showcase update. Added equipped badges, compact showcase page, user-first dashboard layout, leaderboard, server stats and improved icon-based badge display.
Achievements dashboard redesign. Added hero profile section, quick stat cards, tabbed dashboard sections and improved overall user-facing layout.

Integration release. Added automatic File Transformation integration, sidebar and profile injection support, reusable showcase strip, dashboard alias route and first-pass live playback activity tracking.

Standalone achievements route. Added a user-facing #!/achievements route, improved current-user loading, expanded automatic injection and refined sidebar navigation away from direct config-style routing.

Navigation and user-loading improvements. Refined standalone access flow, improved current-user auto-loading, added better empty states and polished movement between the sidebar, profile showcase and achievements interface.

Major achievement overhaul. Added a much larger badge definition set, richer dashboard sections, recent unlocks, next-up tracking, featured showcase loadout, score and streak statistics, improved filtering and sorting and expanded shell-driven achievements UI.

Stability hotfix for the 1.3 dashboard transition. Restored the embedded achievements configuration page, corrected shell loading behaviour and addressed regressions that broke achievements access after the 1.3.0 update.

File Transformation integration revision. Switched shell injection strategy, embedded the shell script directly for transformation output and improved startup registration in an attempt to restore automatic sidebar and route injection.
Leaderboard and shell reliability update. Added user name resolution for leaderboard entries, refined shell API client behaviour and continued work on automatic web integration reliability.
Additional web injection debugging release. Refined File Transformation registration attempts and continued troubleshooting for automatic sidebar and shell loading within the Jellyfin web client.

Fixed File Transformation registration payload type for automatic shell injection. Resolved the startup registration failure by switching to a JObject payload and added the required Newtonsoft.Json dependency.
